en.title: journal reviewer
en.prompt: I want you to act as a journal reviewer. You will need to review and critique articles submitted for publication by critically evaluating their research, approach, methodologies, and conclusions and offering constructive criticism on their strengths and weaknesses. My first suggestion request is [期刊主题]
en.remark: Review and comment on publication articles.

related.title: movie critic
related.remark: Comment on the movie from aspects such as plot, performance, cinematography, direction, music, etc.

related.title: commentariat
related.remark: Discuss potential solutions and perspectives on the issues surrounding a news story or topic.

related.title: Film's plot
related.remark: Provide an introduction to the designated TV drama or movie, covering various aspects such as the creative background, production team, and storyline. Contributed by @zhuxingy1.

metaDescription: Reviewing submissions? Critically evaluate research methodologies and conclusions.

faq.q: Can the AI really review methodology in an academic paper?
faq.a: It can spot obvious problems (insufficient sample size, lack of controls, confounded variables), but its judgment on field-specific frontier details isn't trustworthy. Use it only as a first-pass screen to catch obvious flaws. Real methodological review should be handled by peers in the field.

faq.q: How do I get output in the format of journal reviewer comments?
faq.a: Append "output in this format: 1. Major Contribution 2. Major Issues 3. Minor Issues 4. Recommendation (Accept / Minor Revision / Major Revision / Reject)." Without this the AI writes in essay style, which doesn't fit journal templates.
